Ubud, Bali

KORA
Ubud's Social Dining Space

12 kitchens. Two levels. One atmosphere.

1 800 sqm
12 Kitchens
Dec '26 Opening

The Project

Good food, no compromise.

KORA is not a food court. It's a curated social dining space — 12 selected concepts, two levels, one atmosphere. People come for the food. They stay because of everything around it.

Central Ubud. 4,000 m² of parking. A 70-metre entrance alley built for content. $15,000/month in paid marketing — covered by KORA, not by you. You cook. We fill the seats.

290+ AC Seats Indoor dining comfort regardless of season or weather
Category Protection One concept per category. No internal competition.
Delivery-First Launch Sep–Nov 2026: run delivery only, zero rent, before grand opening
ORA Lounge Bar Second-level bar concept driving evening footfall for all tenants
Interior concept render  ·  KORA Food Hall, Ubud

Commercial Terms

Simple structure.
Predictable overhead.

Base Rent

$35 / m²

Per month. Fixed base makes planning easier.

Revenue Share

12% → 15%

Year 1 at 12% to support launch. Year 2 moves to 15%.

Operating Expenses

5%

Marketing, security, cleaning, waste management of common areas.

Commitment

11 mo

11-month contract with exit option. Built for seasonality.

Available Units

12 kitchens.
One category each.

Category protection is strict — one concept per slot. Units 01 and 12 are already sold.

Unit Economics

Example model:
18 m² unit

Assumptions: delivery is 20% of total revenue. Costs include COGS (40%) + labour (15%) + packaging. Adjust for your concept.
Metric Pessimistic Base Optimistic
Orders / day4070100
Monthly revenue$10,080$17,640$25,200
After KORA fees$7,142$12,499$17,856
Your costs (COGS+labour)$5,353$8,742$12,131
NET profit / month$1,789$3,757$5,725
Margin~18%~21%~23%
CAPEX (fit-out)$24,000
Payback period~13 mo~7 mo~4–5 mo

Even at ~40 orders/day, the unit stays cash-positive. Base target: ~70 orders/day → payback ~7 months.

Deposits & Exclusivity

Three steps to secure your unit

Step 01

Reservation Fee

$1,000

Non-refundable after 2 weeks. Locks your unit and blocks your category — we stop selling that slot immediately.

Step 02

Security Deposit

3 months

Paid at signing. Fully refundable. Standard protection for fit-out and rent.

Step 03

Utilities Bond

IDR 10M ~$650

Paid before opening. Pre-payment buffer for electricity and water usage.

Marketing

All paid by KORA.

IDR 240M / month
~$15,000 USD — monthly ad spend commitment from KORA
📱

Meta Ads (FB/IG)

Targeted to tourists and expats in Bali. Creator and influencer partnerships built in.

🎯

Events & Activations

Yoga, markets, workshops — reasons to visit beyond food. 200+ additional guests per event.

📸

70m Instagram Alley

Visual entrance designed for organic social content. Built for shares, not just visits.

Launch Roadmap

From signing to grand opening

Sep – Oct 2026
Delivery-Only Setup

Operate delivery to test your menu, team, speed, packaging, and SOPs — before the doors open to guests.

No rent · No revenue share
Nov 2026
Soft Opening

Venue opens to guests with full service. Stabilize operations before the grand opening pressure begins.

Dec 2026
Grand Opening

Commercial start. Rent and revenue share activate from 1 December 2026. Full marketing push begins.

Rent & Rev Share Start

The Team

Who you're working with

Founder & CEO
Selena

Initiated and developed KORA from the ground up over three years in Bali. Oversees strategy, tenant selection, and the commercial direction of the project.

Operations Consultant
Evgenia Golomuz

F&B operations specialist. Brings hands-on experience in running and structuring hospitality businesses — she ensures that what's promised to tenants is actually delivered.

Apply

Ideal tenant profile

  • Fast service mindset — target ~10 minute ticket time
  • Proven concept or clear operating experience
  • Focused menu — one hero product is ideal
